company_core.products: Novee provides an AI-driven penetration testing platform that uses black-box testing to detect vulnerabilities and attack paths in real-time, mimicking the strategies of actual attackers. The platform leverages purpose-trained AI models that adapt to environmental changes, continuously validating vulnerabilities and offering customized remediation strategies based on the specific technology stack.

founders.name: Gon Chalamish
founders.background:
Gon Chalamish served as the Research and Development Group Manager at FundGuard from 2024 to 2025, following a notable tenure in the Israel Defense Forces where he held roles including Deputy Commander Chief of Staff and Project Manager. He also led a research and development group within the IDF from 2019 to 2021. Gon holds a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science from Reichman University.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/gon-chalamish-a30966282

founders.name: Ido Geffen
founders.background:
Ido Geffen has over 20 years of experience in cybersecurity, having held significant roles such as VP of Product at Orca Security, where he contributed to revolutionizing cloud security, and VP of Product & Customer Success at Oasis Security, a leader in non-human identity management. He also served as VP of Customer Success & Support at CyberMDX, managing multiple departments to enhance customer journeys. Ido holds a B.Sc. in Computer Science from Ben-Gurion University and an MBA in Management of Technology, Innovation & Entrepreneurship from Tel Aviv University.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/ido-geffen

key_signals.description: Rapid hiring: +32.1% headcount in 90 days (37 employees)

Novee Security has launched a new AI-driven code scanning tool, Claude Code Security, which has successfully identified multiple 0-Day vulnerabilities in PDF engines, highlighting significant advancements in their security offerings. This launch has garnered media attention from outlets like SecurityWeek and Venture Beat, indicating strong market interest and potential for growth.

agent_output.subject: Claude Code Security launch + Novee's AI pen testing approach
agent_output.message:
Hi Gon,

By way of introduction, my name is Danielle and I'm a partner at NEA. We've been grateful to be Series A / B lead investors in companies like Plaid, Databricks, Robinhood, Cloudflare, and many others.

I saw the Claude Code Security launch and the 0-Day vulnerabilities you caught in PDF engines. The black-box approach is really interesting to me, especially how your AI models adapt to environmental changes rather than relying on static rule sets. That continuous validation piece feels like a meaningful shift from traditional pen testing workflows.

I'm curious about how you're thinking about the roadmap from here. Are you expanding the attack surface coverage beyond code (like cloud config, API security), or going deeper on remediation automation? And longer term, how do you see the platform evolving as enterprises start to adopt multiple AI-driven security tools?

Nyle, Hunter and I would love to find a time to get to know you better, learn more about the vision, and tell you a little bit about NEA. Let us know if you'd be open to meeting and when would be a good time.

NEA is a venture capital firm. We lead early rounds in big ideas and work with generational founders. We're partners to companies such as Perplexity (Series A lead), Databricks (Series B lead), Plaid (Series A lead), Robinhood (Series B lead), Cloudflare (Series B lead), and many others. Our team is based in Menlo Park, CA and NYC.

Danielle
